variants: Baran Ersoy is a skilled shipwright currently employed by Knotwise Shipwrights. He was born in Vermilion Green, where his early fascination with maritime craftsmanship took root. Now residing in Cricketwillow Town, Baran has made significant contributions to the field of naval engineering. He is the author of the innovative Dawnstone Indexer, designed to optimize ship design and construction. His efforts have been recognized with the prestigious Riverstone Seal, a testament to his commitment and skill in shipbuilding.
